name: Deltarune Soundfont
author: Mr_Incognito
description: Some of the instruments used in the songs are from VST plugins, so I have substituted with similar instruments. Using the information provided from https://docs.google.com/document/d/1P6Ng2Swio02c6f827jdFl3DDYGa9KmeBfqZtiDy0U/edit I was able to compile these sounds into one singular soundfont for easy use.
